---
title: "making_autodock_boxplot_acyl_lengths"
format: html
---
```{r}
#correct 18th april even tho 7th april did do it ut mb didnt save idk
# Load libraries
library(tidyverse)
library(here)

# Set a reproducible relative path to your project folder
project_dir <- here("Docking", "AutoDockVina",
                    "acyl_tail_lengths",
                    "autodock_pdbqt_outputs")

all_files <- list.files(project_dir,
                         pattern = "\\.pdbqt$",
                         full.names = TRUE)

# protein prefix
protein_name <- "paLpxH"


# 2) function to extract Vina score
get_score <- function(f) {
  lines <- readLines(f, warn = FALSE)
  line <- grep("^REMARK VINA RESULT", lines, value = TRUE)[1]
  if (!is.na(line)) as.numeric(strsplit(line, "\\s+")[[1]][4]) else NA
}

# 3) build results table
results <- tibble(
  file = all_files,
  Tail = sub(
    paste0("^", protein_name, "_(\\d+Ctail)_\\d+\\.pdbqt$"),
    "\\1",
    basename(all_files)
  ),
  Score = map_dbl(all_files, get_score)
)
#convert tails to factor
results$Tail <- as.factor(results$Tail)
# 4) plot
binding_boxplot <- ggplot(results, aes(x = Tail, y = Score, fill=Tail)) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.8, show.legend = FALSE) +
  labs(
   title = "Autodock Vina predicted binding affinities with increasing acyl tail length",
    x = "Tail length",
    y = "Affinity (kcal/mol)"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
  )
show(binding_boxplot)
#adding medina
#binding_violin + geom_boxplot(width=0.1, color="red")
#adding plots
#binding_violin + geom_boxplot(width=0.15)
```


```{r}
#OLD VERSION
# required packages: "tidyverse"

# Load libraries
library(tidyverse)
library(here)

# Set a reproducible relative path to your project folder
project_dir <- here("Docking", "AutoDockVina",
                    "acyl_tail_lengths",
                    "autodock_pdbqt_outputs")

# protein prefix
protein_name <- "paLpxH"

# 1) find all relevant Vina output files in parent folder + subfolders
all_files <- list.files(
  path = "..",   # parent = "acyl tail lengths"
  pattern = paste0("^", protein_name, "_\\d+Ctail_\\d+\\.pdbqt$"),
  full.names = TRUE,
  recursive = TRUE
)

# 2) function to extract Vina score
get_score <- function(f) {
  lines <- readLines(f, warn = FALSE)
  line <- grep("^REMARK VINA RESULT", lines, value = TRUE)[1]
  if (!is.na(line)) as.numeric(strsplit(line, "\\s+")[[1]][4]) else NA
}

# 3) build results table
results <- tibble(
  file = all_files,
  Tail = sub(
    paste0("^", protein_name, "_(\\d+Ctail)_\\d+\\.pdbqt$"),
    "\\1",
    basename(all_files)
  ),
  Score = map_dbl(all_files, get_score)
)
#convert tails to factor
results$Tail <- as.factor(results$Tail)
# 4) plot
binding_violin <- ggplot(results, aes(x = Tail, y = Score, fill=Tail)) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.8) +
  labs(
   title = "Vina binding scores by acyl tail length",
    x = "Tail length",
    y = "Affinity (kcal/mol)"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
  )
show(binding_violin)
#adding medina
#binding_violin + geom_boxplot(width=0.1, color="red")
#adding plots
#binding_violin + geom_boxplot(width=0.15)
```
